_comment: Confirmed real, guaranteed direct mapping: @qdosassist.co.uk = QDOS. Audit phrase list re-derived fresh for this rebuild (not copied from any prior classifier). dualCommissioningPhrases intentionally omitted here — QDOS's real template literally reads "REPORT + AUDIT REPORT", which is already the seeded default in registry/defaults.ts, so QDOS just inherits it.

auditSignalPhrases: audit of the previous engineer's report
